# MEOK AI Labs - Compliance MCP Fleet

> 340+ Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. One per regulation. All MIT-licensed, PyPI-installable, and registered in the official MCP registry at registry.modelcontextprotocol.io.

Built by MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI Ltd, UK Companies House 16939677). Solo founder Nick Templeman, Yorkshire UK.

Site: https://meok.ai
Org: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG
Fleet: https://meok.ai/fleet/
Scorecard: https://proofof.ai/scorecard

## Installation

```bash
# All packages are pip-installable with the same pattern:
pip install <package-name>
# or
uvx <package-name>
```

## AI BOM / SBOM (2 packages)

- [ai-bom-mcp](https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/ai-bom-mcp): PyPI:Y MCP-registry:N score:84/100
- [sbom-cyclonedx-mcp](https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/sbom-cyclonedx-mcp): PyPI:Y MCP-registry:N score:90/100
